title: @eng_khairallah1: Boris Cherny, the creator of Claude Code at Anthropic, just shipped 125 settings for Claude in this talk he breaks down
summary: @eng_khairallah1: Boris Cherny, the creator of Claude Code at Anthropic, just shipped 125 settings for Claude in this talk he breaks down
whyItMatters: Boris Cherny, the creator of Claude Code at Anthropic, just shipped 125 settings for Claude in this talk he breaks down exactly how most Claude users are wasting tokens: - the 10% you lose to CLAUDE.md before typing a word - memory scoped per project so past work never bleeds into new conversations - cache_control on the wrong line turning an $87 bill into…
